description_long: This is a rectangular chessboard with a classic 8x8 grid pattern, featuring alternating red and black squares. The board is set up for play, with two full sets of chess pieces: one set in glossy red and the other in glossy black, each arranged in their standard starting positions. The chessboard itself appears to have a polished, slightly reflective surface, and the border is a thin, marble-like band that frames the playing area. The chess pieces are stylized in a traditional Staunton design, with each piece clearly distinguishable by shape and size. The overall appearance is modern and striking, with the bold color contrast making the board visually distinctive. The object is compact and portable, suitable for placement on tables or benches in urban parks or recreational areas.
description: A glossy red-and-black chessboard with a marble-like border, featuring full sets of red and black chess pieces in starting positions. The board has a polished, modern look with strong color contrast.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red chess pieces closest, all arranged in their starting positions, with the black pieces opposite.
description_view_1: Side view displaying both sets of pieces lined up on either side of the board, emphasizing the board's rectangular shape and the alternating square pattern.
description_view_2: Rear view with the black chess pieces in the foreground and the red pieces at the far end, mirroring the front view.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the red pieces on the right and black pieces on the left, highlighting the symmetry and grid layout.
attribute_board_pattern: The playing surface consists of an 8x8 grid of perfectly square tiles, alternating between deep red and black colors. The squares are arranged in a regular, checkerboard pattern with sharp, clean edges and no decorative motifs within the grid itself.
attribute_border_design: The border is a thin, marble-like band in a grayish tone, slightly raised above the playing surface, with a smooth, polished finish and no visible ornamentation, inscriptions, or markings.
